promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next concrete residual paired-family refinement immediately after the non-AB A2-mid batch preserved the control-versus-successor boundary and deferred the AB family.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the strongest family-level seams: AB pair identity, CNOT-dependent MI revival, local evidence without repo-top admission, MI signal without negativity, and metric comparison against the non-AB control.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The non-AB A2-mid batch provides the exact control comparison packet, the prior historyop batch provides the residual-pair shell continuity, and the sims evidence-boundary batch provides the local evidence versus repo-top omission pattern.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because the next residual pair must stay outside this bounded AB-family pass.
Not selected because it would erase the control-versus-successor boundary preserved by both parent batches.
Not selected because the parent family batch already contains the needed bounded seams.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent paired-family batch plus nearby A2-mid sims anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable AB family-shell, MI-revival, evidence-status, and control-comparison packets without reopening raw sims files.

candidate_items.name: AXIS0_AB_BRANCH_PAIR_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the cleanest shell for the AB-coupled residual paired family.

candidate_items.name: CNOT_COUPLING_MI_REVIVAL_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the decisive contract-dependent signal packet in the AB family.

candidate_items.name: LOCAL_AB_EVIDENCE_WITHOUT_REPOTOP_ADMISSION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's main visibility contradiction for the AB family.

candidate_items.name: MI_SIGNAL_WITHOUT_NEGATIVITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the cleanest MI-without-negativity packet in the AB family.

candidate_items.name: MI_GAIN_WITH_SAGB_ATTENUATION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest anti-flattening comparison packet against the non-AB control.

candidate_items.name: NONAB_CONTROL_BOUNDARY_RULE

quarantined_items.name: THE_FIX_COMMENT_AS_REPOTOP_ADMISSION_OR_CANONIZATION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The runner comment is weaker than repo-top evidence admission and does not canonize the family.

quarantined_items.name: NONZERO_MI_AS_NEGATIVITY_ONSET
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves zero negativity fraction despite nonzero MI.

quarantined_items.name: AB_COUPLING_AS_ONE_DIMENSIONAL_METRIC_IMPROVEMENT
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: AB coupling raises MI while softening the absolute SAgB branch gap, so the shift is not one-dimensional.

quarantined_items.name: AB_SIGNAL_BACKPROJECTED_ONTO_NONAB_CONTROL
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The non-AB sibling remains machine-zero on the MI layer and cannot inherit the AB family's signal retroactively.

quarantined_items.name: COMPACT_BRANCH_MEANS_AS_FULL_DYNAMIC_PROOF
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves only compact branch-level means and deltas, not richer dynamic structure.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates preserve the strongest reusable family-level packets from the AB discriminator batch without reopening raw sims files.
They keep family identity, local-only evidence status, CNOT-dependent MI revival, MI-without-negativity, and the non-AB comparison boundary distinct instead of collapsing them into one story.
They remain small, source-linked, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later residual family work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain rhetoric-overreads, negativity-overreads, one-dimensional-metric overreads, backprojection overreads, or compact-format overreads rather than reusable A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated entirely from existing intake artifacts after the required control-surface reads already completed earlier in the thread.
Used nearby A2-mid sims batches only as comparison anchors.
No raw source reread, runtime execution, or A2-1 mutation was performed.
